code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut p = 0
  mut neg = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut tok = ""
  while i <= n
    let at_end = i == n
    mut is_ws = false
    if at_end
      is_ws = true
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            p = p + v
          else if v < 0
            neg = neg + v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      let b2 = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b2)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let r = p - neg
  println("r=#{r}")
end
